papers.claim: LLM layers can operationalize optimization workflows through explainable stakeholder-facing what-if analysis without replacing the MILP/combinatorial core.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact classifies it as a screened advanced extension with moderate certainty (sufficiency 0.62) and defers it as non-core for formulation/solution quality evidence.

papers.claim: A MILP-first integrated supply-chain model can be made more tractable by adding PPO-based learning support and relax-and-fix heuristics while preserving exact-optimization structure.
papers.evidence: Full-review decision notes end-to-end integrated decisions with MILP baseline plus RL-assisted acceleration; sufficiency reported as 0.78.

papers.claim: Learning unknown constraints/objectives and embedding them into MIO provides a principled advanced-method path for partially observed decision systems.
papers.evidence: Decision cites trust-region and ensemble mechanisms as directly relevant to learning-assisted optimization over MILP/MIO, with high sufficiency (0.87).

papers.claim: Prediction-augmented MILP pipelines can deliver large runtime gains while making speed-versus-guarantee tradeoffs explicit in recurring planning settings.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact reports exact-core plus constraint screening/warm starts/subspace restriction, including 4.3x speedup with guarantees and 10.2x without; sufficiency 0.88.

papers.claim: GA+MILP matheuristics are an effective advanced extension for integrated production-distribution planning when exact models face scalability limits.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact indicates direct supply-chain planning fit, low uncertainty, and sufficient support (0.82) for coordinated production-distribution decisions.

papers.claim: A MILP-first thesis can rigorously screen AI-OR methods using a taxonomy of prediction-and-optimization, policy learning, and ML-guided heuristics with generalization-risk criteria.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact identifies high methodological relevance for advanced-methods framing, with moderate sufficiency (0.78) and limited domain-specific modeling evidence.

papers.claim: Coupling ML demand forecasting with dynamic inventory control provides a practical prediction-and-optimization extension that improves over EOQ baselines.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact reports LR/RF/SVR plus dynamic (t,R,S) control with performance gains vs EOQ; sufficiency 0.82, but scoped as extension rather than core integrated MILP.

papers.claim: ML augmentation of branch-and-bound components offers a solver-level pathway to speed up MILP after model formulation.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact highlights branching/cuts/node-selection/heuristics/configuration acceleration relevance, with moderate support and lower sufficiency (0.66).

papers.claim: Iterative ANN prediction plus MILP network optimization can handle endogenous demand-network feedback while retaining an optimization backbone and scalable decomposition.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact reports an ANN+MILP iterative framework with two-stage heuristic scaling and strong alignment to advanced extensions; sufficiency 0.86.

papers.claim: Combining formal network optimization with an evolutionary-game cooperation layer extends classical optimization to digitally coordinated supply-chain strategy design.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact cites objective/constraint model solved by branch-and-bound plus strategic layer and case cost reduction; anchors_count 8 and sufficiency 0.78.

papers.claim: Prescriptive ML for repeated mixed-integer convex solves can improve feasibility performance as an AI-OR acceleration layer over exact optimization.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact indicates high relevance to advanced-methods track and sufficient evidence (0.84) under moderate uncertainty.

papers.claim: Exact integrated location-production-inventory-distribution optimization with integrated-vs-sequential benchmarking provides a robust baseline for evaluating advanced-method extensions.
papers.evidence: Decision artifact reports high relevance, anchors_count 6, and sufficiency 0.86, including practical extension dimensions (time windows, multi-echelon, environmental criteria).
